expectations.evidence: Valid JSON but different schema: uses subject{}, rpvs_registration{entries[]}, ubo_data{}, risk_assessment{}, summary (string). Missing: suppliers_investigated, persons[], connections, rpvs[], zlte_stopy[].
rpvs_registration.entries has the data but NOT as rpvs[] array with registered/status/vlozka/ubos/verification_date fields matching the specified schema.
ubo_data.konecni_uzivatelia_vyhod has Zdenka Krizanova with date_of_birth, nationality, address, public_official=false.
No fabricated connections. risk_assessment.flags mentions single UBO and prior deletion but these are real findings.
summary is a prose string, not a structured object with rpvs_registered count. risk_assessment has rpvs_registered=true but not in summary format.
